title: The Sons’ Cups — Closing Beat
description: The future Straw Hat Grand Fleet leaders offer their loyalty to Luffy.
scene: On pages 12–14, Luffy, Bartolomeo, Cavendish, Sai, Ideo gather after Dressrosa and the future Straw Hat Grand Fleet begins to take shape.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: When it comes to being honest or respectable, you've got me beat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But at least I can call myself a champion!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ideo and I have decided to join forces and go out to sea together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oi, don't for- get about us! We're coming too, right!? Brother!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm getting this guy to let me on his ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm *Letting you* Join so call me captain, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: pirate Prince GAVENDSH

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Also, don't forget that I'm your Senpai!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm sorry to have to do this you, but I'm going to be the one basking in all the popularity!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the heck are you guys babbling about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You guys can all just do whatever you want, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Well, thing is... during those two days we were huddled in the palace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We all happened to come to a mutual under- standing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Allow me to explain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: by the way, we decided on this order by way of a lottery.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: First off, we have the 75 members of the "Beautiful Pirate Crew"! Their representative is their captain, "White Horse Cavendish"!"!"!"!"!"!"!"!"!"!"*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Next we have the 56 members of the Barto Club! Their captain is Bartolomeo the canni- bal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The approximately 1000 members of the HAPPO Navy! Led by their 13th chief, Don Sai!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: The 200 members of the Tontatta Tribe's Tonta Corps! Led by Leo the Warrior!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: The four members of the XXX gym Martial Arts Alliance! Their representative is idea, the destruction cannon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: At the moment it's only got 5 members but the soon-to- be-formed giant pirate crew and all its members! Their captain is hajrudin!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: And last but not least we have the 4300 members of my yonta Maria Grand Fleet! With me as Admiral!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Pioneer adventurer orlumbus, at your Beck and call!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Altogether, that makes $600 people! Luffy-senpai,

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Would you do us the honor of exchanging a cup of sake...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: With us seven representatives to form our parent-child relationship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Parent and Child!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: That's right baby! You're gonna be the big daddy boss now! And we're your underling children!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Please, would you grant us the honor of joining as subordinate crews...?!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Underneath the flagship Straw Hat crew!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: An unexpected explosion in numbers!?

summary: This part shows the Dressrosa allies trying to define their bond with Luffy, while Luffy resists formal command and keeps his freedom at the center.
